case_title: HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST VS. NHUNG NGUYEN et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT: 1. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ( CCP 585) 2. ATTORNEY'S FEE AND COSTS ( CCP 1033) 3. COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HSBC BANK NEVADA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO DMCCB, NA.

AFTER HEARING, PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212)
